# Drilling Rate

**Summary**: The speed at which the drill bit penetrates the rock formation.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017]] optimized ROP by correlating it with WOB, RPM, and Torque.

## Scientific Context

- [[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017]] Primary metric for drilling efficiency and cost reduction.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017]] Measured in feet per hour.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The average increase in ROP percentage is almost more than 55% in all wells when using the model. ([[2017-al-rubaii|AL-RUBAII, 2017, p. 135]])
